monitor_the_situation.title: US Strikes Iran for Eighth Night; Iran Hits Kuwait, Bahrain in Retaliation, 2 US Soldiers Killed in Jordan Drone Attack, 1 Missing, Escalating Regional Conflict, US and Iran Exchange Strikes, IRGC Tar
US Strikes Targets Southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan, Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Ahvaz, Khuzestan, Iran · 6h ago. US airstrikes hit targets southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan Province, southwestern Iran, according to Tasnim News Agency, amid ongoing US-Iran war.
US Launches Airstrikes on Iran in Strait of Hormuz
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 14h ago. US forces strike IRGC targets in the Strait of Hormuz, retaliating for a drone attack on a US base in Jordan that killed two American servicemembers.
US Strikes Iran for Seventh Night, Tankers Explode in Strait of Hormuz
